title: Craftable Bottle O Enchant
description: Now craft  your Craftable Bottle O Enchant!!!
body:
# Craftable Bottle o' Enchanting

**XP On Demand**

Bottle o' Enchanting is great for quick XP boosts — but in vanilla Minecraft, it’s locked behind trading with villagers or creative mode. This datapack breaks the barrier and lets you craft it like any other potion, giving you instant access to experience when you need it most.

Note: “Bottle o' Enchanting Recipe” is a custom recipe added by the datapack. If you are interested in more datapacks, check out the links at the end of the description.

**🧠 Why It’s Better:** 

Because XP shouldn’t be gated behind RNG trades or commands. Whether you're repairing gear, enchanting tools, or fueling your grindstone, this pack gives you a reliable way to stock up on experience without the hassle.

**📦 How to Use:**

1. Download the .zip

2. Drop it into your world’s datapacks/ folder

3. Type /reload in-game

4. Start crafting your bottles and boost your XP whenever you need
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
